title: Biggest one day short accumulation
author: fibspeak
selftext:
A few days ago I posted an analysis from my agents close to the top with a target of 7200 (and expected a slight over shoot of that). 

The current low of 7220 misses that which gives a strong bias towards this rally being a bull trap. 

Bear profile accumulated biggest one day position today. 

First major offload of risk was 7426 making the position net even (or nominal loss) if all stops hit. 

  
Let's see if we get the new low to pay it off.

comments.author: fibspeak
comments.body: Bulk target low was 7370 and market low was 7365.  decent result. still a couple small shorts running at risk but good day regardless at this point .
